issues.reason: The blue door at [11,2] is reachable from the main route through [10,2], so the player can spend the single blue key to enter [11,1] and bypass the intended final red door at [10,1]. This makes the red gate non-critical and contradicts the route-tax annotation.
issues.required_change: Remove the blue-door exit bypass: block the [10,2] to [11,2] approach or relocate the blue door from [11,2] into an internal east-branch gate while keeping the tracked blue-door quota exact.

required_changes: Remove the blue-door exit bypass: block the [10,2] to [11,2] approach or relocate the blue door from [11,2] into an internal east-branch gate while keeping the tracked blue-door quota exact.
summary: Local economy review passed. | Tracked quotas match the floor contract and remaining budget, the entrance free region exposes only one starter yellow key, and no final enemy tiles are present. Repair is required because the upper blue door currently bypasses the intended final red gate.
